mapper.sql: id, scenic_id, scenic_name, stay_time, `time`, date_log, date_type, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into jzgyd_scenic_passenger_stay_time (id, scenic_id, scenic_name, stay_time, `time`, date_log, date_type, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.scenicId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.scenicName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.stayTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dateLog,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.dateType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
on duplicate key update stay_time = values(stay_time), update_time = sysdate()
